name: Grapefruit, Avocado and Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from spinach.
2. Wash spinach thoroughly and dry.
3. Tear leaves into bite-size pieces.
4. Wrap gently in paper towels and refrigerate in zip-lock bags until ready to toss salad.
5. Peel and section grapefruits.
6. Slice avocados into quarters, then cut each slice into two-inch chunks.
7. At serving time, toss spinach with vinaigrette.
8. Add grapefruit and avocados and gently toss again.
9. Alternatively, arrange grapefruit and avocado slices decoratively on a bed of dressed spinach on individual serving plates.
10. Pass additional dressing, if desired.
